title: Data set for "Assessing RNA atomistic force fields via energy landscape explorations"
author: Pasquali, Samuela
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data set for RNA force field comparison. The files provided are the energy landscape databases and these can be unpacked with the PATHSAMPLE program (https://www-wales.ch.cam.ac.uk/PATHSAMPLE/).
steps_raw: Data set for RNA force field comparison. The files provided are the energy landscape databases and these can be unpacked with the PATHSAMPLE program (https://www-wales.ch.cam.ac.uk/PATHSAMPLE/).
